message:
fix(resources): add bounds to prevent unbounded memory growth

- hub.ts: Add MAX_PENDING_ACKS_PER_CONNECTION (1000) to prevent
  memory exhaustion from clients that don't acknowledge messages
- handoff.service.ts: Add MAX_TOTAL_HANDOFFS (10,000) to cap the
  in-memory handoff store size
- metrics.ts: Add MAX_TIME_SERIES_KEYS (5000) to limit unique
  metric series that can be created
- idempotency.ts: Add stale pending request cleanup with 5-minute
  max age as safety net for edge cases

All limits are generous for normal operation but prevent resource
exhaustion under adversarial or buggy conditions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
